page_metadata.biotools__summary: This is a plotting tool for Lagrange-NG, which is a tool for inferring ancestral biogeographies. It takes the results JSON file and plots the results as an SVG. The results are plotted as a phylogram with pie charts at the interior nodes displaying the likelihood weight ratio for the top distributions.
